name: Caribbean Pepper Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 Scallion, including the green top, minced
1 Scotch Bonnet-type chile, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all of the ingredients together.
2. Pour the mixture into a bottle.
3. Secure the stopper on the bottle.
4. Allow the mixture to stand in a dark place for at least one week.
5. Use sparingly. This oil has a fiery tang that makes it perfect for marinades and grilled meat, or even salad dressing.
Note: When working with chiles, use rubber gloves (or coat your hands with oil). Be sure to wash your hands thoroughly afterward, as capsaicin can irritate eyes or mucous membranes if it comes into contact with them.
